title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: PHOENIX HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 745 N Rose Street Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: All children 2-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-3:30pm (541) 897-5151 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 897-5151 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Phoenix Talent School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30pm-3:30pm when school is in session Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PHOENIX HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
